app_subtitle: Search & rescue prioritization — Caracas and La Guaira
intro: This tool **does NOT locate casualties**: it estimates the **relative probability of finding living survivors** per cell, combining shaking intensity, structural vulnerability, population present at the time of the earthquake, survival void spaces and elapsed time. Use it to **prioritize SAR teams**, not as ground truth.
disclaimer_sintetico: ⚠️ SYNTHETIC demo data. For operational use, set the real event in config.yaml.
col_poblacion: Est. persons at time of quake
subtitulo_zona: Probability of living survivors per cell
kpi_poblacion_presente: Est. persons at time of quake
nota_modelo: Index = shaking × collapse(HAZUS) × population(WorldPop) × survivability × decay(72h) + field reports. Target: living survivors, NOT fatalities.
nota_proyeccion: ℹ️ Statistical projections (HAZUS/FEMA) with cited methodology — not observed data. Estimated uncertainty ±20%. See sources in sidebar.
reportes_intro: Log calls, rescue-team or social signals. Each report raises the priority of nearby cells in its zone.
guardado_ok: ✅ Report saved. Zone priority will be recomputed.
modo_operativo_label: OPERATIONAL MODE — real data + cited statistical projections
sismo_doble_banner: ⚠️ DOUBLET EARTHQUAKE: two events 38 seconds apart ({m1} M{mag1} + {m2} M{mag2}), epicenters ~5.5 km apart. The maximum-envelope of both ShakeMaps is used (combined real shaking).
banner_sin_shakemap: ⛔ USGS ShakeMap is UNAVAILABLE right now. This zone's priority map cannot be computed from real data. Do NOT use for decisions until the source is restored.
banner_sin_poblacion: ⚠️ Population layer UNAVAILABLE (neither local nor remote). Prioritization uses only shaking + time + reports. Run scripts/download_population.py or check connection.
banner_pop_remota: ℹ️ Population loaded remotely (WorldPop via HTTP). No TIF download required.
nota_poblacion: WorldPop residential population × HAZUS occupancy at 18:05 VET. Statistical projection — uncertainty ±20%.
recursos_ninguno: No resources mapped in OSM for this zone (verify on the ground).
alerta_ventana72: 🔍 First 72 hours are the highest-probability statistical window. Every hour counts — prioritize high-priority cells immediately.
ventana_agotada: 💪 Past the 72-hour statistical window. Probability decreases but **never reaches zero**. Turkey 2023: survivors rescued at +200 hours; Haiti 2010: +15 days. Continue SAR operations focused on cells with confirmed reports.
actualizacion_tiempo_real: 🕒 Index updates in real time: time decay (continuous) + field reports (immediate) + USGS ShakeMap (every 5 min). Population = estimate at moment of quake (18:05 VET, static).
atribucion: Data: USGS · OpenStreetMap (© contributors) · WorldPop · Copernicus EMS · Maxar Open Data · UNOSAT · NASA ARIA
